title: Rowland, Joanna - Director General, Customer Services Group, Director General, UK Visas and Immigration, and Director General, His Majesty's Passport Office, Home Office - ACOBA advice
body: "Ms Rowland left her role at the Home Office in November 2025.  CEO, Royal Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (RSPCA)  Ms Rowland sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with the RSPCA. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2025; and the appointment was announced in October 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  "
